member_descriptions: black leather recliner, right edge crop
black metal fireplace insert, glass front
light wood top dark base partial
dark wooden barstool with black seat
dark wooden cabinet lower edge crop
dark brown wooden cabinet door edge
dark brown wooden cabinet door, edge-cropped
glossy dark blue compact coffee maker
brown wooden chair, partial edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Close-up of a black glossy leather couch back showing vertically ribbed padded cushions with stitched seams and light creasing; partial edge-cropped view with three visible padded segments, approximately 0.6 m from camera.

Close-up of a dark black glossy leather recliner armchair showing a padded high back, visible vertical stitched seams and a thick cushioned armrest; the view is edge-cropped on the right and slightly top-cropped, approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.

Close-up of a white plastic vertical electrical outlet wall plate with two narrow rectangular receptacle openings and a central mounting screw, smooth matte finish and slightly edge-cropped on the left; approximate distance from camera ~0.6 m.

Partial edge-crop of a dark brown leather sofa with a glossy, slightly worn finish, visible stitched seams and padded vertical-channel back cushions; left armrest and two seat cushions are visible while the right side is cut off — appears approximately 1.2 meters from the camera.

Dark reddish-brown mahogany wooden side cabinet with a single top drawer over a paneled door, molded plinth base, metal knob and glossy finish; vertical rectangular form, mostly visible though slightly occluded on the left by adjacent sofa, approximate distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Dark brown leather two-seat loveseat with shiny, worn upholstery and deep creasing on the seat and back cushions, padded rolled arms and horizontal stitched cushion segments; the right side is slightly edge-cropped in the image and the couch appears about 1.5 meters from the camera.

Flat, low-pile dark navy/black rectangular rug that fills the crop horizontally and is partially edge-cropped (top/bottom cut off); shows slight fading/wear and scattered speckling or dust, thin profile with no visible fringe; approximate distance from camera ~1.2 m.

Front-facing black metal fireplace insert with a dark glass front and a single visible faux log inside; rectangular matte trim and lower horizontal ledge visible. Interior is partly obscured by a dark area at the top (appears partially masked or edge-cropped). Photographed at approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.

Large dark glossy window pane with highly reflective glass showing interior reflections — a staircase railing, a seated/standing human silhouette and a bright lamp; framed edges visible and slight glare/haze, estimated ~3.0 m from camera.

Off-white/cream folded cotton kitchen towel with blue-gray printed text and decorative graphic, hanging folded on a rack; woven/tea-towel texture with hemmed edges and light creasing, partially cropped at the image edge — estimated distance ~0.7 m from camera.

Front portion of a stainless-steel freestanding oven/range with a black glass door and a white towel draped over the handle; lower storage drawer visible and surface shows floor reflections; crop is partial/edge-cut and the appliance appears approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial white pleated fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and scalloped rim above a decorative clear glass or ceramic base; small tabletop lamp, cut off at the edges of the crop and estimated about 0.7 meters from the camera.

Tall dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed center panel and simple top molding, matte finish with faint scuffs; the right edge is cropped and partially occluded by another object, suggesting a full-height wall or pantry cabinet approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden tall cabinet (wardrobe-style) with vertical recessed-panel doors and a matte finish; the right side of the unit is cut off by the crop indicating a partial view, with minor surface wear visible on panels — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a rectangular dining/island table with a light wood (butcher-block or laminated) top that slightly overhangs a dark stained wooden cabinet-style base with vertical panel doors; a small white rectangular sticker or outlet cover is visible on the right side and a wooden chair is partially visible at the left — camera roughly 1.5 m away.

Dark reddish-brown mahogany chair with an ornate pierced and carved back splat and polished glossy finish; wooden seat and front legs are visible but the lower base is slightly edge-cropped in the image — appears roughly 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown glossy wooden barstool with a round black cushioned seat and a circular metal/wood footrest ring; front curved legs and stretcher visible, stool is medium-height (bar stool) and partially occluded by a person's arm and red cloth — approximate distance ~1.2 m from camera.

Front-facing stainless steel side-by-side double-door refrigerator with two vertical black handles centered between the doors, reflective slightly streaked surface with faint scratches and smudges visible; mostly fully visible in the crop, estimated distance ~1.2 meters from camera.

Close-up of a lower dark mahogany wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and glossy finish, showing scuffing and wear along the base and a right edge that is cropped by the image border; approximate distance ~0.6 m from the camera.

Dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and narrow raised frame, vertical orientation, occupying most of the crop and edge-cropped at the left; smooth finish with mild surface glare; estimated distance ~1.0 m from camera.

Small rectangular teal rug with a darker teal center and a narrow white border; low-pile/flat-weave appearance, partially occluded by two white bowls and lying on a hardwood floor — appears to be a small placemat-sized rug roughly 0.6 m from the camera.

Dark stained wooden cabinet door with a vertical recessed central panel and molded frame, smooth slightly glossy finish showing wood grain and minor surface wear; mostly visible but edges are slightly cropped in the image, estimated ~1.0 m from the camera.

Front-facing dark-stained wooden cabinet showing two adjacent rectangular raised-panel doors with visible wood grain and a worn, slightly scuffed finish; no handles or hardware visible and a narrow vertical seam between the doors, shadowed lighting; estimated distance ~1.8 m from the camera.

Dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and visible toe-kick at the base; left edge of the door is cropped by the image border and the finish appears matte with minor scuffs and wear near the bottom — roughly 0.6 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped light brown wooden cabinet door showing vertical wood grain and a faint horizontal handle/trim near the upper area; smooth veneer finish with slight shadowing along the side, appears to be a lower cabinet panel and is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).

Partial lower-front view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet with two raised rectangular panel doors and a central seam; warm brown glossy finish with visible vertical wood grain, scuffs and small chips along the bottom toe-kick, and the image is edge-cropped — approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow surrounding frame; matte stained finish with slight scuffing near the bottom edge and a thin gap visible at the base — appears photographed close-up, approximately 0.5 meters from the camera.

Partial/edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown, high-gloss carved wooden dining chair showing an ornate scrolled arm/leg and a small portion of a dark upholstered seat; chair appears well-finished and is approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial, edge-cropped dark brown stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular panel and visible vertical wood grain; occupies the right side of the crop with the top near a yellow wall, no hardware visible, appears close to the camera (approx. 0.5 m).

Dark stained wooden double-door cabinet with vertical recessed panels and a slight glossy finish, centered in the crop and partially occluded by hanging glass light shades; faint small round handles visible along the door seam — appears approximately 3.0 meters from the camera.

Glossy dark blue to black plastic compact coffee maker with a rounded top and curved front, small tabletop appliance appearance, slight surface reflections; mostly visible but slightly cut off at the left edge; photographed close-up (≈0.5 m).

Dark brown wooden paneled cabinet door (vertical recessed panels with beveled edges), surface shows matte stained wood grain and no visible hardware in the crop; the cabinet is partially edge-cropped by the image border and appears about 1.2 m from the camera.

Partial brown wooden dining chair visible in a vertical crop showing a dark upholstered seat cushion and part of a slatted back; lower legs and frame are visible with a slightly worn wood finish and the left side is edge-cropped — object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).
clusters.representative_description: Dark stained wooden cabinet door with a vertical recessed central panel and molded frame, smooth slightly glossy finish showing wood grain and minor surface wear; mostly visible but edges are slightly cropped in the image, estimated ~1.0 m from the camera.
